title: CPU Clock Cycle and Clock Rate
description: A diagram illustrating how a clock signal drives the execution of a simple CPU instruction cycle, showing the relationship between clock cycles, clock rate, and instruction execution time.
relationships: Each rising edge of the clock signal triggers the start of a new pipeline stage
The duration of one clock cycle is the period (T), and the clock rate (frequency) is 1/T
Multiple clock cycles are required to complete a single instruction through the pipeline stages
